creator: issei@jp.FreeBSD.org
text:
Update japanese/tcsh ports.

1. Update base tcsh version from 6.07.06 to 6.07.09
2. Separate NLS catalog from japanese/tcsh to japanese/tcsh-nls-*
3. Delete man/man1/tcsh.1.gz from PLIST. Now, define MAN1=tcsh.1 macro in
   Makefile is enough.

  Change the maintainer's e-mail address from <issei@t-cnet.or.jp> to
<issei@jp.FreeBSD.org>. Only the address has been changed, the maintainer
is still the same person.
